title: Anita Garibaldi
writer: Enzo Biagi, Renzo Renzi, Sandro Bolchi
actors: Anna Magnani, Raf Vallone, Alain Cuny
plot: The story of Giuseppe Garibaldi's 1849 campaign to free Italy from Austrian domination. Although the defence of Rome has become impossible, Garibaldi declares his intent to continue the struggle for republican liberty and a unifie...
